title: Merry Christmas And Happy New Year!
content:
آ آ آ آ Little cullud Rastus come a-skippinï؟½ down de street,
آ آ آ آ A-smilinï؟½ and a-grinninï؟½ at every one he meet;
آ آ آ آ My, oh! He was happy! Boy, but was he gay!
آ آ آ آ Wishinï؟½ ï؟½Merry Chrisï؟½musï؟½ anï؟½ ï؟½Happy New-Yearï؟½s Dayï؟½!
آ آ آ آ Wishinï؟½ that his wishes might every one come true,
آ آ آ آ And, bless your dear heart, honey, I wish the same to you!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Ellis Parker Butler delivers a powerful performance in "Merry Christmas And Happy New Year!"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
